title: Streaming API Documentation Accuracy
summary: Streaming API documentation has several inaccuracies in README.md: (1) CryptoKlineVisionData.create_stream() shown as class method but is instance method requiring manager.create_stream(); (2) StreamConfig(symbols=..., interval=...) incorrect - actual is StreamConfig(market_type=MarketType.FUTURES_USDT); (3) update.close_price incorrect - actual is update.close; (4) update.timestamp incorrect - actual is update.open_time; (5) KlineStream doesn't have close() method - use async context manager. src/CLAUDE.md streaming docs are accurate.

tests: Verified streaming API implementations: KlineUpdate, StreamConfig, create_stream
